Name: UCircularThrobber
Description:
A throbber widget that orients images in a spinning circle.
  
   No Children
   Spinner Progress

Variables.Name: Period
Variables.Description: The amount of time for a full circle (in seconds)

Variables.Name: Radius
Variables.Description: The radius of the circle. If the throbber is a child of Canvas Panel, the 'Size to Content' option must be enabled in order to set Radius.

Variables.Name: PieceImage_DEPRECATED
Variables.Description: Image to use for each segment of the throbber

Functions.Name: SetNumberOfPieces
Functions.Description: Sets how many pieces there are.

Functions.Name: SetPeriod
Functions.Description: Sets the amount of time for a full circle (in seconds).

Functions.Name: SetRadius
Functions.Description: Sets the radius of the circle.
